author: oscarbenjamin
text:
The problem is that internally this gets expanded massively by `futrig` I think. Basically something like this but much bigger:

```
In [5]: cos((x + 1)**2).expand(trig=True)
Out[5]: 
              ⎛ 2⎞                                           ⎛ 2⎞               ⎛ 2⎞    2                ⎛ 2⎞               2       ⎛ 2⎞             ⎛ 2⎞
- 2⋅sin(x)⋅sin⎝x ⎠⋅cos(1)⋅cos(x) - 2⋅sin(1)⋅sin(x)⋅cos(x)⋅cos⎝x ⎠ - 2⋅sin(1)⋅sin⎝x ⎠⋅cos (x) + sin(1)⋅sin⎝x ⎠ + 2⋅cos(1)⋅cos (x)⋅cos⎝x ⎠ - cos(1)⋅cos⎝x ⎠
```

author: smichr
text: Thanks for looking into that, [@oscarbenjamin](https://github.com/oscarbenjamin). Masking of multinomials before expanding might be a good idea.

author: smichr
text: identifying generators in the args of the trig functions and replacing them with symbols before simplifying would be a possibility
